title: SaltMons
description: This pack adds various different Pokémon to your world!
body:
This pack adds:
- Rotom
- Rotom-Wash
- Rotom-Heat
- Rotom-Mow
- Rotom-Frost
- Rotom-Fan
- Heatran
- Landorus-Therian
- Samurott-Hisui
- Kyurem
- Meltan
- Melmetal
- Gholdengo (≤ v1.1b)
- Gimmighoul (≤ v1.1b)
- Paldean Wooper (≤ v1.1b)
- Clodsire (≤ v1.1b)

**Evolution & Forms**
- Due to Cobblemon currently not having the Rotom appliances in the mod, the form change requirements have been tweaked from the official requirements, and currently count as "evolutions" due to limitations. Rotom Forms will unfortunately be able to keep the special moves of each when swapping between forms. Take note of this and make rules on your server/world if you do not want this to be abused in battle.

Evolution:
- Rotom -> Wash (Water Stone)
- Rotom -> Heat (Fire Stone)
- Rotom -> Mow (Leaf Stone)
- Rotom -> Frost (Ice Stone)
- Rotom -> Fan (Thunder Stone)
- Dewott -> Samurott-Hisui (Level 36)
- Meltan -> Melmetal (Level 72)

Rotom can freely turn back into base Rotom without any requirements. Please note that you will be required to use another evolution stone to change form again.

Base Rotom's Model is heavily inspired by Requin's (@itzrequin) base Rotom model! Melmetal's Model is heavily inspired by The_Ace_Defective (@the_ace_defectives) and 8BallBoi123 (@8ballboi123). Show them some love and support, they're very talented!
